items.titleZh: 痹痛方通过调节JAK2/STAT3信号通路治疗类风湿关节炎的机制研究
items.abstractZh: 探讨痹痛方（YBD）在类风湿关节炎（RA）中的治疗作用并阐明其潜在机制，特别关注JAK/STAT信号通路。采用网络药理学分析预测痹痛方的生物活性成分和潜在治疗靶点。建立胶原诱导关节炎（CIA）大鼠模型以验证体内预测效果。通过Western blotting、酶联免疫吸附试验（ELISA）和组织病理学分析评估关节组织和血清炎症生物标志物的变化。网络药理学分析鉴定出YBD中128种生物活性成分，其中槲皮素和木犀草素被预测为关键活性化合物。在CIA大鼠中，YBD治疗显著下调踝关节组织中IL-6、IL-17、IL-23、JAK2和STAT3的表达（P < 0.05），并显著降低血清抗环瓜氨酸肽（抗CCP）抗体和类风湿因子水平（P < 0.05）。同时，关节炎指数显著降低，组织病理学检查显示滑膜增生和软骨破坏显著减轻。这些发现表明，YBD通过涉及抑制JAK/STAT信号通路的多成分、多靶点调节机制发挥抗类风湿关节炎作用。槲皮素和木犀草素可能通过抑制促炎细胞因子产生和改善关节病理变化而促进这些效应。YBD通过抑制JAK/STAT信号通路及相关炎症反应改善类风湿关节炎，从而为其在类风湿关节炎中的潜在治疗应用提供机制基础。

items.title: Multisystem IgG4-Related Disease Mimicking Malignancy With Cavitary Pulmonary Nodules, Pleural Thickening and Hepatic Mass-Like Lesions: A Case Report.
items.abstract: IgG4-related disease (IgG4-RD) is a multisystem fibroinflammatory condition that can mimic metastatic malignancy. A 49-year-old woman presented with a 6-month history of progressive dyspnoea, nonproductive cough and severe weight loss. Computed tomography demonstrated diffuse bronchocentric and perilymphatic pulmonary nodules with cavitation and consolidation, right pleural thickening and multifocal peripheral-enhancing hepatic mass-like lesions. Given concern for disseminated malignancy, bronchoscopy with bronchoalveolar lavage was performed and was negative for infection and malignancy. Lung biopsy showed fibrosis with marked CD138-positive plasma cell infiltration and microabscesses. As concern for malignancy persisted, a liver biopsy was performed for diagnostic clarification. Liver biopsy showed ductular reaction, patchy fibrosis and increased IgG4-positive plasma cells, with elevated serum IgG4 (798.0 mg/dL). The patient met the 2020 revised comprehensive diagnostic criteria for possible IgG4-RD and showed rapid improvement with glucocorticoid therapy. IgG4-RD should be considered in patients with multisystem mass-forming lesions to avoid misdiagnosis and delayed treatment.

items.title: Tumor necrosis factor inhibitor prescribing and persistence by specialty in radiographic axial spondyloarthritis: a Korean claims study.
items.abstract: Although several studies have shown that specialist care may be associated with better outcomes, methodological limitations have made it difficult to draw definitive conclusions. Therefore, we examined real-world patterns of tumor necrosis factor inhibitor (TNFi) use for radiographic axial spondyloarthritis (r-axSpA) across prescribing specialties and compared TNFi retention between internal medicine and other departments using a nationwide claims database. Using Health Insurance Review and Assessment Service claims data (January 1, 2011 to June 30, 2022), we identified patients diagnosed with r-axSpA who initiated their first TNFi treatment. Baseline characteristics, TNFi retention by specialty and agent, and discontinuation risk were assessed. HRs for TNFi discontinuation were estimated using Cox proportional hazards models. Among 5,944 TNFi initiators, 2,543 received adalimumab, 1,026 etanercept, 876 infliximab, and 1,499 golimumab. Most patients were treated in internal medicine (n = 5,102, 85.8%), followed by orthopedics (n = 622, 10.5%), neurosurgery (n = 185, 3.1%), and other departments (n = 35, 0.6%). TNFi retention was the highest in internal medicine. In multivariable analyses, the risk of discontinuation was higher in orthopedics (HR 1.24, 95% CI 1.11-1.37, p < 0.001), neurosurgery (HR 1.82, 95% CI 1.53-2.16, p < 0.001), and other departments than in internal medicine (HR 2.41, 95% CI 1.72-3.36, p < 0.001). TNFi retention was the highest in internal medicine, suggesting that care in this department may be associated with better treatment continuity in r-axSpA. Standardized management protocols and education may help optimize care across specialties.

items.titleZh: 放射学中轴型脊柱关节炎中肿瘤坏死因子抑制剂处方与持续使用情况：一项韩国医保研究
items.abstractZh: 尽管多项研究表明专科治疗可能与更好的结局相关，但方法学限制使得难以得出明确结论。因此，我们利用全国医保数据库，研究了不同处方专科中放射学中轴型脊柱关节炎（r-axSpA）患者使用肿瘤坏死因子抑制剂（TNFi）的真实世界模式，并比较了内科与其他科室的TNFi持续使用率。利用健康保险审查与评估服务（Health Insurance Review and Assessment Service）的索赔数据（2011年1月1日至2022年6月30日），我们识别出首次启动TNFi治疗的r-axSpA患者。评估了基线特征、按专科和药物分类的TNFi持续使用率以及停药风险。使用Cox比例风险模型估计TNFi停药的风险比（HR）。在5,944名TNFi启动者中，2,543人使用阿达木单抗，1,026人使用依那西普，876人使用英夫利西单抗，1,499人使用戈利木单抗。大多数患者在内科接受治疗（n=5,102，85.8%），其次是骨科（n=622，10.5%）、神经外科（n=185，3.1%）和其他科室（n=35，0.6%）。内科的TNFi持续使用率最高。在多变量分析中，与内科相比，骨科（HR 1.24，95% CI 1.11-1.37，p<0.001）、神经外科（HR 1.82，95% CI 1.53-2.16，p<0.001）和其他科室（HR 2.41，95% CI 1.72-3.36，p<0.001）的停药风险更高。内科的TNFi持续使用率最高，提示该科室的治疗可能与r-axSpA患者更好的治疗连续性相关。标准化的管理方案和教育可能有助于优化跨专科的护理。

items.title: From Sjögren syndrome to Sjögren disease: rethinking classification and diagnostic complexity.
items.abstract: Sjögren syndrome (SS), traditionally regarded as a sicca-predominant condition, is now recognized as a systemic autoimmune disease characterized by type I interferon activation, B-cell hyperactivity, and periepithelial lymphocytic infiltration. This conceptual shift has prompted changes in terminology, with "SS" increasingly replaced by "Sjögren disease (SjD)" and "secondary SS" by "associated SjD," reflecting the concept of polyautoimmunity and ensuring equal clinical standing. In this review, we trace the historical evolution of SS classification criteria and examine their limitations in real-world clinical practice. Current classification criteria employ a weighted scoring system incorporating objective measures, including anti-Ro antibodies, salivary gland histopathology, and exocrine function tests. However, their diagnostic application in routine care is constrained by spectrum bias, clinical heterogeneity, the presence of mimickers, and shared clinical features with other autoimmune diseases. Over-reliance on serological markers, driven by their accessibility, may further contribute to misdiagnosis. We highlight that accurate diagnosis requires flexible clinical reasoning and contextual interpretation beyond rigid adherence to classification criteria. Individualized diagnostic strategies should integrate demographics, laboratory findings, salivary ultrasonography, and histopathology. Practical challenges in diagnosing and evaluating disease activity in associated SjD are also discussed.

items.titleZh: 从干燥综合征到干燥病：重新思考分类与诊断复杂性
items.abstractZh: 干燥综合征（SS）传统上被视为以干燥症状为主的疾病，但现在被认为是一种以I型干扰素激活、B细胞过度活跃和上皮周围淋巴细胞浸润为特征的系统性自身免疫性疾病。这一概念转变促使术语发生变化，“SS”逐渐被“干燥病（SjD）”取代，“继发性SS”被“相关性SjD”取代，反映了多自身免疫的概念，并确保临床地位平等。在本综述中，我们追溯了SS分类标准的历史演变，并探讨了其在真实临床实践中的局限性。当前的分类标准采用加权评分系统，纳入客观指标，包括抗Ro抗体、唾液腺组织病理学和外分泌功能测试。然而，其在常规诊疗中的诊断应用受到谱系偏倚、临床异质性、模拟疾病的存在以及与其他自身免疫性疾病共有临床特征的限制。由于可及性，过度依赖血清学标志物可能进一步导致误诊。我们强调，准确诊断需要灵活的临床推理和情境解释，而非僵化地遵循分类标准。个体化诊断策略应整合人口学特征、实验室检查结果、唾液腺超声和组织病理学。本文还讨论了相关性SjD诊断和疾病活动性评估中的实际挑战。

items.title: Reanalysis of Public Transcriptomes Reveals Shared Immune Signatures Between Major Depressive Disorder And Dermatomyositis With Single-Cell Context.
items.abstract: This study aimed to identify candidate shared transcriptomic signals between major depressive disorder and dermatomyositis through an integrative bioinformatic reanalysis of public GEO datasets with single-cell contextualization. The analytical workflow included Weighted Gene Co-expression Network Analysis (WGCNA) for key module identification, Gene Ontology (GO) and Kyoto Encyclopedia of Genes and Genomes (KEGG) enrichment analyses for functional characterization, GeneMANIA- and a network visualization platform-based network analysis for candidate-gene prioritization, and evaluation of 113 machine-learning models combined with SHapley Additive exPlanations (SHAP) for diagnostic feature selection. Gene Set Enrichment Analysis (GSEA), immune infiltration analysis, and single-cell RNA-seq-based contextualization were subsequently performed to further characterize the immune-related cellular context of the identified signals. Integration of dermatomyositis-related GEO datasets identified 570 differentially expressed genes, from which 33 candidate shared genes were obtained via WGCNA. Functional enrichment and network analyses highlighted immune defense, cytotoxicity, and pathways including PPAR, IL-17, and antigen processing, with ELANE, PPBP, and CTSG emerging as highly connected nodes. Machine-learning-based feature prioritization retained 8 candidate model-selected genes, namely KIF4A, OLR1, KIR2DL4, KRT23, KIR3DS1, AZU1, SCG5, and LRRC37E. Immune infiltration analysis associated these shared genes with regulatory T cells (Tregs), resting mast cells, resting dendritic cells, and both classically activated (M1) and alternatively activated (M2) macrophages. Single-cell RNA-seq contextualization further suggested that CD8⁺ T-cell subsets with different candidate-gene score states showed distinct intercellular communication patterns. Among these, the MIF-(CD74+CD44) axis and signals from naive/central memory T cells were notable features requiring further validation. Overall, this study identified candidate shared transcriptomic signals between major depressive disorder and dermatomyositis and highlighted immune-related cellular contexts that warrant further validation in true comorbid cohorts.

items.titleZh: 公共转录组重分析揭示重度抑郁症与皮肌炎之间共享的免疫信号及单细胞背景
items.abstractZh: 本研究旨在通过整合生物信息学方法，对公共GEO数据集进行重分析并结合单细胞背景，识别重度抑郁症与皮肌炎之间共享的候选转录组信号。分析流程包括：加权基因共表达网络分析（WGCNA）用于关键模块识别；基因本体（GO）和京都基因与基因组百科全书（KEGG）富集分析用于功能表征；基于GeneMANIA和网络可视化平台的网络分析用于候选基因优先级排序；以及结合SHapley Additive exPlanations（SHAP）的113种机器学习模型评估用于诊断特征选择。随后进行基因集富集分析（GSEA）、免疫浸润分析以及基于单细胞RNA-seq的背景分析，以进一步表征所识别信号的免疫相关细胞背景。整合皮肌炎相关GEO数据集后，鉴定出570个差异表达基因，通过WGCNA获得33个候选共享基因。功能富集和网络分析强调了免疫防御、细胞毒性以及PPAR、IL-17和抗原加工等通路，其中ELANE、PPBP和CTSG成为高度连接的节点。基于机器学习的特征优先级排序保留了8个候选模型选择基因，即KIF4A、OLR1、KIR2DL4、KRT23、KIR3DS1、AZU1、SCG5和LRRC37E。免疫浸润分析将这些共享基因与调节性T细胞（Tregs）、静息肥大细胞、静息树突状细胞以及经典活化（M1）和替代活化（M2）巨噬细胞相关联。单细胞RNA-seq背景分析进一步提示，具有不同候选基因评分状态的CD8⁺ T细胞亚群表现出不同的细胞间通讯模式。其中，MIF-(CD74+CD44)轴以及来自初始/中央记忆T细胞的信号是需要进一步验证的显著特征。总体而言，本研究识别了重度抑郁症与皮肌炎之间共享的候选转录组信号，并强调了免疫相关细胞背景，这些需要在真正的共病队列中进一步验证。

items.title: Macrophage Metabolic Reprogramming in Rheumatoid Arthritis: Pathogenic Mechanisms and Therapeutic Implications.
items.abstract: Rheumatoid arthritis (RA) is a chronic autoimmune disease characterised by persistent synovitis, progressive cartilage destruction and bone erosion. Recent advances in single-cell and spatial omics, together with immunometabolic studies, have revealed marked state heterogeneity among synovial macrophages in RA. Their metabolic reprogramming appears to sustain pathogenic cellular states, drive aberrant intercellular communication and impair the resolution of inflammation. Rather than acting as an independent initiating factor, it more likely operates as a downstream amplifier of disease. In this review, we outline the principal functional states and metabolic features of synovial macrophages in health and RA. We focus on how the rewiring of glucose, lipid and amino acid metabolism links inflammatory transcription, tissue remodelling and bone destruction. These connections are mediated by metabolic enzymes, metabolic intermediates, redox regulation and epigenetic modifications. We further summarise the immunometabolic effects of currently available antirheumatic drugs. We also appraise the preclinical evidence and translational limitations of metabolic pathway inhibitors, natural products and nanodelivery systems. It should be noted that most existing evidence still relies on in vitro polarisation systems and rodent models. Validation of metabolic flux, cell-state specificity and causal relationships in human synovium remains limited. As a narrative review focused on recent studies of synovial macrophage metabolism in health and inflammation, this work aims to delineate how metabolic reprogramming shapes the phenotypic heterogeneity and pathogenic functions of macrophages in RA. It also seeks to appraise the potential value and current boundaries of evidence for therapeutically targeting macrophage metabolism.

items.titleZh: 类风湿关节炎中的巨噬细胞代谢重编程：致病机制与治疗意义
items.abstractZh: 类风湿关节炎（RA）是一种以持续性滑膜炎、进行性软骨破坏和骨侵蚀为特征的慢性自身免疫性疾病。单细胞和空间组学以及免疫代谢研究的最新进展揭示了RA滑膜巨噬细胞中显著的状态异质性。它们的代谢重编程似乎维持了致病细胞状态，驱动了异常的细胞间通讯，并损害了炎症的消退。与其作为独立的起始因素，它更可能作为疾病的下游放大器发挥作用。在这篇综述中，我们概述了健康和RA中滑膜巨噬细胞的主要功能状态和代谢特征。我们重点关注葡萄糖、脂质和氨基酸代谢的重新连接如何与炎症转录、组织重塑和骨破坏相关联。这些联系由代谢酶、代谢中间体、氧化还原调节和表观遗传修饰介导。我们进一步总结了现有抗风湿药物的免疫代谢效应。我们还评估了代谢通路抑制剂、天然产物和纳米递送系统的临床前证据和转化局限性。需要注意的是，现有的大多数证据仍然依赖于体外极化系统和啮齿动物模型。在人类滑膜中代谢通量、细胞状态特异性和因果关系的验证仍然有限。作为一篇聚焦于健康和炎症中滑膜巨噬细胞代谢近期研究的叙述性综述，本文旨在阐述代谢重编程如何塑造RA中巨噬细胞的表型异质性和致病功能，并评估以巨噬细胞代谢为治疗靶点的潜在价值和当前证据边界。

items.title: Purpura as the initial manifestation of IgG4-related disease with concomitant systemic lupus erythematosus: a case report.
items.abstract: Purpura is a common clinical manifestation of a wide variety of diseases, including extremely uncommon conditions. In this study, we report the case of a 61-year-old man who initially presented with purpura and was ultimately diagnosed with coexisting immunoglobulin G4 (IgG4)-related tubulointerstitial nephritis (TIN) and class II lupus nephritis. The patient was treated with a combination of prednisone (Pred), hydroxychloroquine (HCQ), and mycophenolate mofetil (MMF). Within 1 month of treatment, the purpura resolved, and qualitative urine protein testing turned negative. During an 8-month follow-up period, sustained clinical improvement was observed. For the first time, this study highlights purpura as the initial presentation of concurrent IgG4-related disease and systemic lupus erythematosus (SLE) and describes a novel renal pathological overlap characterized by IgG4-related tubulointerstitial injury alongside lupus-induced mesangioproliferative glomerulonephritis (MsPGN). These findings provide new insights into the diagnosis, management, and prognosis of this rare condition.

items.titleZh: 紫癜作为IgG4相关疾病伴系统性红斑狼疮的首发表现：一例病例报告
items.abstractZh: 紫癜是多种疾病（包括极罕见疾病）的常见临床表现。在本研究中，我们报告了一例61岁男性患者，最初表现为紫癜，最终被诊断为同时存在免疫球蛋白G4（IgG4）相关肾小管间质性肾炎（TIN）和II型狼疮性肾炎。患者接受了泼尼松（Pred）、羟氯喹（HCQ）和吗替麦考酚酯（MMF）的联合治疗。治疗1个月内，紫癜消退，尿蛋白定性检测转为阴性。在8个月的随访期间，观察到持续的临床改善。本研究首次强调紫癜作为并发IgG4相关疾病和系统性红斑狼疮（SLE）的首发表现，并描述了一种新的肾脏病理重叠特征，即IgG4相关肾小管间质损伤合并狼疮诱导的系膜增生性肾小球肾炎（MsPGN）。这些发现为这种罕见疾病的诊断、管理和预后提供了新的见解。

items.title: The risk association between systemic lupus erythematosus and glaucoma: a systematic review and meta-analysis.
items.abstract: Systemic Lupus Erythematosus (SLE) is a systemic autoimmune disease that may damage multiple organs. About one-third of SLE patients have ocular manifestations. SLE as a potential risk factor for glaucoma has attracted attention, but existing study conclusions remain controversial. This meta-analysis aimed to evaluate the risk association between SLE and glaucoma and provide supportive evidence for the comorbidity follow-up of SLE patients. The PubMed, EMBASE and Web of Science databases from the establishment of the database to November 2025 were retrieved, and studies measuring the association between SLE and glaucoma risk by hazard ratio (HR), odds ratio (OR), relative risk (RR), incidence rate ratio (IRR) and 95% confidence interval (CI) were included. Two researchers independently screened the literature, extracted the data and evaluated the risk of bias in the included studies. Meta-analysis was conducted using RevMan 5.3 software. Five cohort studies were included, involving 5516709 participants. Meta-analysis showed that SLE was associated with an increased risk of glaucoma (OR = 2.85, 95% CI: 1.26-6.47, P  = 0.01). Subgroup analyses showed stronger associations in studies with fewer covariate adjustments and in those that did not adjust for corticosteroid use. Existing evidence suggests that SLE may be associated with an increased risk of glaucoma. Given the limitations of this study, more prospective studies with rigorous design and full control of confounding factors are needed for further verification. https://www.crd.york.ac.uk/prospero, identifier CRD420261303001.

items.titleZh: 系统性红斑狼疮与青光眼的风险关联：系统评价与荟萃分析
items.abstractZh: 系统性红斑狼疮（SLE）是一种可能损害多个器官的系统性自身免疫性疾病。约三分之一的SLE患者有眼部表现。SLE作为青光眼的潜在危险因素已引起关注，但现有研究结论仍存在争议。本荟萃分析旨在评估SLE与青光眼之间的风险关联，并为SLE患者的共病随访提供支持性证据。检索了PubMed、EMBASE和Web of Science数据库从建库至2025年11月的文献，纳入了通过风险比（HR）、比值比（OR）、相对风险（RR）、发病率比（IRR）及95%置信区间（CI）衡量SLE与青光眼风险关联的研究。两名研究者独立筛选文献、提取数据并评估纳入研究的偏倚风险。使用RevMan 5.3软件进行荟萃分析。共纳入5项队列研究，涉及5,516,709名参与者。荟萃分析显示，SLE与青光眼风险增加相关（OR = 2.85，95% CI：1.26-6.47，P = 0.01）。亚组分析显示，在协变量调整较少以及未调整皮质类固醇使用的研究中，关联性更强。现有证据表明，SLE可能与青光眼风险增加相关。鉴于本研究的局限性，需要更多设计严谨、充分控制混杂因素的前瞻性研究进行进一步验证。https://www.crd.york.ac.uk/prospero，标识符CRD420261303001。

items.title: Differences in clinical features between axial psoriatic arthritis and axial spondyloarthritis: a systematic review and meta-analysis of observational studies.
items.abstract: Classification of axial psoriatic arthritis (ax-PsA) within existing spondyloarthritis (SpA) criteria remains unclear. To clarify this issue, we compared the clinical features of ax-PsA and axial SpA (ax-SpA). In this systematic review and meta-analysis, we searched six databases (PubMed, Web of Science, Cochrane Library, Ovid, Scopus, and Embase) and one trial registry (ClinicalTrials.gov) for studies published from inception to April 20, 2025, without language restrictions. Observational studies comparing ax-PsA and ax-SpA were included. Meta-analyses were conducted to evaluate disease activity scores, spinal function scores, inflammatory markers, and HLA-B27 positivity. Fifteen studies including 2,704 patients with ax-PsA and 9,248 with ax-SpA from diverse global populations were analyzed. Meta-analysis showed no significant differences between ax-PsA and ax-SpA in the Bath Ankylosing Spondylitis Disease Activity Index, Ankylosing Spondylitis Disease Activity Score, Bath Ankylosing Spondylitis Functional Index, or C-reactive protein levels. However, ax-PsA was associated with significantly lower HLA-B27 positivity compared with ax-SpA (risk ratio, 0.37; 95% confidence interval [CI], 0.32-0.43; p < 0.001). In subgroup analyses, ax-PsA demonstrated modestly better BASFI scores than ankylosing spondylitis (mean difference, -0.35; 95% CI, -0.64--0.05; p = 0.022). The marked difference in HLA-B27 positivity between ax-PsA and ax-SpA supports their distinction as separate disease entities. Similar disease activity and functional outcomes suggest shared downstream inflammatory pathways. The lower HLA-B27 positivity in ax-PsA may reflect alternative mechanisms of interleukin (IL)-23/IL-17 axis activation, with potential therapeutic implications. Clinical differentiation should incorporate HLA-B27 testing and imaging. Future research should focus on disease course variability and subgroup-specific characteristics. https://www.crd.york.ac.uk/PROSPERO/view/CRD420251043651, identifier: CRD420251043651.

items.titleZh: 中轴型银屑病关节炎与中轴型脊柱关节炎临床特征的差异：一项观察性研究的系统评价和荟萃分析
items.abstractZh: 中轴型银屑病关节炎（ax-PsA）在现有脊柱关节炎（SpA）分类标准中的归属仍不明确。为阐明这一问题，我们比较了ax-PsA与中轴型脊柱关节炎（ax-SpA）的临床特征。在本系统评价和荟萃分析中，我们检索了六个数据库（PubMed、Web of Science、Cochrane Library、Ovid、Scopus和Embase）和一个试验注册库（ClinicalTrials.gov），查找从建库至2025年4月20日发表的研究，无语言限制。纳入比较ax-PsA与ax-SpA的观察性研究。进行荟萃分析以评估疾病活动评分、脊柱功能评分、炎症标志物和HLA-B27阳性率。分析了15项研究，包括来自全球不同人群的2,704例ax-PsA患者和9,248例ax-SpA患者。荟萃分析显示，ax-PsA与ax-SpA在Bath强直性脊柱炎疾病活动指数、强直性脊柱炎疾病活动评分、Bath强直性脊柱炎功能指数或C反应蛋白水平方面无显著差异。然而，与ax-SpA相比，ax-PsA的HLA-B27阳性率显著较低（风险比，0.37；95%置信区间[CI]，0.32-0.43；p < 0.001）。在亚组分析中，ax-PsA的BASFI评分略优于强直性脊柱炎（均差，-0.35；95% CI，-0.64至-0.05；p = 0.022）。ax-PsA与ax-SpA之间HLA-B27阳性率的显著差异支持它们作为不同疾病实体的区分。相似的疾病活动和功能结局提示共享的下游炎症通路。ax-PsA中较低的HLA-B27阳性率可能反映了白细胞介素（IL）-23/IL-17轴激活的替代机制，具有潜在的治疗意义。临床鉴别应结合HLA-B27检测和影像学检查。未来研究应关注病程变异性和亚组特异性特征。https://www.crd.york.ac.uk/PROSPERO/view/CRD420251043651，标识符：CRD420251043651。

items.title: Potential association between IL-17A inhibition and blood pressure reduction in patients with axial spondyloarthritis.
items.abstract: This study aimed to investigate longitudinal changes in blood pressure associated with IL-17A inhibition in patients with axial spondyloarthritis (ax-SpA). This was a single-center, prospective, single-arm exploratory study that included 50 axSpA patients who received the IL-17A inhibitor Ixekizumab (160 mg loading dose at week 0, followed by 80 mg every 4 weeks for 12 weeks). Disease activity (ASDAS-CRP, ASDAS-ESR, BASDAI), inflammatory markers (CRP, ESR, IL-6), and blood pressure were monitored at baseline and every 4 weeks after treatment initiation. A linear mixed-effects model was used to analyze longitudinal changes in blood pressure. IL-17A inhibition significantly improved disease activity and reduced inflammatory marker levels (all p < 0.001). Systolic blood pressure (SBP), diastolic blood pressure (DBP), and mean arterial pressure (MAP) all showed time-dependent decreases. Linear mixed-effects models estimated a reduction of 0.90 mmHg every 4 weeks for SBP (95% CI: -1.87 to 0.07, p = 0.071) and 0.91 mmHg per month for DBP (95% CI: -1.64 to -0.17, p = 0.016). Subgroup analysis showed that the rate of DBP decline was more pronounced in patients with baseline hypertension (n=36). After 12 weeks, SBP and DBP were decreased by 4.80 mmHg and 5.10 mmHg, respectively. No obvious side effects were observed in hematological, hepatic or renal function tests (both p < 0.01). In this exploratory pilot study, IL-17A inhibition was associated with effective control of disease activity and a concomitant, time-dependent reduction in blood pressure in patients with ax-SpA. Linear mixed-model analysis suggested this reduction was particularly evident for DBP in patients with baseline hypertension. These findings provide preliminary clinical evidence supporting further investigation into the potential cardiovascular modulatory effects of IL-17A-targeted therapy. However, the uncontrolled design necessitates confirmation in randomized trials.

items.title: Interleukin-10 at the crossroads of immunity in TLR7-induced lupus.
items.abstract: Systemic lupus erythematosus (SLE) is a prototypical autoimmune disease characterized by dysregulated innate and adaptive immunity. Soluble mediators like cytokines critically shape immune responses and sustain chronic inflammation. Interleukin-10 (IL-10), typically anti-inflammatory, also exerts pro-inflammatory effects in SLE, for example by promoting B cell differentiation and autoantibody production. Despite growing interest in IL-10 as a biomarker or therapeutic target, its dual roles have been reported inconsistently, likely reflecting differences in disease context, clinical presentation, disease activity, and the local microenvironment, an issue addressed in this work. To further clarify its role in lupus, we investigated its function in a toll-like receptor 7 (TLR7) agonist-induced murine model. By administering an antagonistic anti-IL-10 receptor (anti-IL-10R) antibody, we investigated its broad in vivo effects on the progression of lupus-like features and associated immune changes. We then examined the signaling pathways underlying observed immune alterations. IL-10 showed both pro- and anti-inflammatory effects on immune cells; however, overall, it modestly limited disease progression, indicating that, under the given conditions, its regulatory, anti-inflammatory effects may slightly outweigh its pro-inflammatory actions. The most pronounced effects were seen in the CD4 T-cell compartment, where IL-10R blockade increased IL-17, while reducing regulatory T cell (T reg ) frequencies, IL-10 and slightly also interferon gamma (IFN-γ) expression. Mechanistically, IL-10 activated similar downstream pathways in T effector cells (CD4 + FoxP3 - T eff ) and CD4 + FoxP3 + T reg , with signal transducer and activator of transcription 3 (STAT3) signaling being most prominent. We speculate that the heightened sensitivity of T regs to IL-10R blockade may stem from slightly elevated IL-10R expression. Collectively, these findings highlight dual role of IL-10 in lupus and suggest how a single cytokine may trigger opposing immune effects via shared signaling pathways. Further research is needed to clarify how a pro-inflammatory context directs IL-10 signaling toward stimulatory or suppressive outcomes, informing new therapeutic strategies for diseases such as SLE.

items.title: Cellular Glucose Transport and Inflammatory Blood Markers in Rheumatoid Arthritis Spectrum: An Immunometabolic Perspective.
items.abstract: Rheumatoid arthritis (RA) is increasingly recognized as an immunometabolic disorder. This study evaluated whether glucose-handling markers, including glucose transporter 1 (GLUT1) and hexokinase 2 (HK2), and circulating inflammatory markers differed between RA cases and healthy controls and whether these markers were associated with DAS28-based disease activity in an exploratory secondary analysis. A retrospective secondary analysis was conducted using data from 160 participants, comprising 80 cases and 80 controls. Variables included demographic characteristics, fasting glucose, erythrocyte sedimentation rate (ESR), C-reactive protein (CRP), interleukin-6 (IL-6), serum amyloid A (SAA), neutrophil-to-lymphocyte ratio (NLR), platelet-to-lymphocyte ratio (PLR), Disease Activity Score in 28 joints (DAS28), GLUT1, and HK2. Nonparametric tests were used for group comparisons, and Spearman's correlation was used to assess within-case associations. Cases demonstrated significantly higher GLUT1 and HK2 levels than controls (both p < 0.001), along with elevated ESR, interleukin-6, SAA, NLR, and PLR. HK2 was significantly higher in high-activity than moderate-activity cases (p = 0.037), whereas GLUT1 was not. Within-case correlations were weak and nonsignificant. These findings support a measurable immunometabolic signature in RA. HK2 may show exploratory association with DAS28-based activity categories; however, prospective validation is required before clinical application.

items.title: A test of a conceptual model of uncertainty, benefit and burden in children and young people with juvenile dermatomyositis.
items.abstract: Mental health concerns are highly prevalent in children and young people (CYP) with chronic conditions. This is further exacerbated by perceived feelings of illness uncertainty and illness burden, which have negative implications for CYP with childhood-onset chronic conditions and their families. Understanding the mechanisms that reduce health-related quality of life (HRQoL) and identifying resilience factors is important to improve outcomes for these vulnerable populations. The current study aimed to assess HRQoL in CYP with juvenile dermatomyositis (JDM) and to test a new conceptual model of illness representations and resilience in depression and anxiety. CYP ages ≥8 years who were enrolled in the UK-wide JDM cohort and Biomarker Study (JDCBS) in 15 UK National Health Service tertiary paediatric rheumatology services were invited to complete five validated paediatric measures: PedsQL 4.0 Core, PedsQL 3.0 Rheumatology Module, Paediatric Index of Emotional Distress (PI-ED), Childhood Uncertainty in Illness Scale (CUIS) and Benefit and Burden Scale for Children (BBSC). Data were analysed using descriptive statistics and structural equation modelling. Results showed that the HRQoL in CYP with JDM is affected as a result of their chronic condition. Moreover, the proposed model revealed that illness uncertainty and burden are key driving factors that cause an increase in anxiety and depression, while benefit finding did not ameliorate poor mental health outcomes. Addressing illness uncertainty and reducing the perceived disease burden is vital to improve HRQoL and well-being in CYP with JDM who struggle to cope with the unpredictable nature of their disease.

items.title: Clinically Probable Late-Onset Familial Mediterranean Fever Presenting as Recurrent Pericarditis and Suggestive of Evolving Constrictive Physiology.
items.abstract: Familial Mediterranean fever (FMF) is a rare genetic autoinflammatory disorder that usually appears in childhood. It is marked by recurrent episodes of fever and inflammation of the serous membranes. Late-onset cases are rare and often misdiagnosed due to symptoms similar to those of other infections or inflammatory diseases. We report the case of a 65-year-old man who presented with recurring fever, pleural effusions, and pericarditis over two months, suggestive of evolving constrictive physiology. Despite being hospitalized several times, tests for infections and cancers ruled out other causes. This included thoracenteses, a pericardial window, a pleural biopsy, and bone marrow analysis. Pathology showed fibrinous pericarditis and chronic pleuritis with fibrosis, without signs of cancer. The patient was started on colchicine, which led to a quick improvement in his condition. Considering the symptom presentation and response to colchicine, we diagnosed clinically probable FMF based on established criteria, noting that late-onset presentations over the age of 60 represent fewer than 5% of all FMF cases. This case emphasizes the need to suspect FMF in patients with unexplained recurrent serositis, even in older individuals. Although heart involvement in FMF is uncommon, it can imitate serious conditions and delay proper treatment. Colchicine is the main treatment, and regular follow-ups are important to check for response and side effects. A team approach is vital, especially in unusual cases, to lower the risk of complications such as amyloidosis and heart problems.

items.titleZh: 临床可能晚发型家族性地中海热表现为复发性心包炎并提示进展性缩窄性生理
items.abstractZh: 家族性地中海热（FMF）是一种罕见的遗传性自身炎症性疾病，通常出现在儿童期。其特征为反复发作的发热和浆膜炎症。晚发型病例罕见，且常因症状与其他感染或炎症性疾病相似而被误诊。我们报告一例65岁男性患者，在两个月内出现反复发热、胸腔积液和心包炎，提示进展性缩窄性生理。尽管多次住院，感染和癌症检查排除了其他原因，包括胸腔穿刺、心包开窗、胸膜活检和骨髓分析。病理显示纤维蛋白性心包炎和慢性胸膜炎伴纤维化，无癌症迹象。患者开始使用秋水仙碱治疗后，病情迅速改善。考虑到症状表现和对秋水仙碱的反应，我们根据既定标准诊断为临床可能FMF，并指出60岁以上晚发型病例占所有FMF病例的不到5%。本病例强调，即使对于老年患者，当出现不明原因的反复浆膜炎时，也应怀疑FMF。尽管FMF的心脏受累不常见，但它可能模仿严重疾病并延误正确治疗。秋水仙碱是主要治疗方法，定期随访对于监测疗效和副作用很重要。多学科团队方法至关重要，尤其是在不典型病例中，以降低淀粉样变性和心脏问题等并发症的风险。

items.title: The Relationship Between Diagnosis and Severity of Axial Spondyloarthritis and Overactive Bladder: A Cross-Sectional Analysis.
items.abstract: This study aims to evaluate the frequency of overactive bladder syndrome (OAB) and its relationship with disease activity in patients diagnosed with axial spondyloarthritis (axSpA). The study included 127 axSpA patients and 110 healthy individuals meeting age and gender criteria were included in the study. The demographic data, laboratory results, and clinical parameters of the groups were recorded and compared. axSpArelated disease activity was assessed with the Bath Ankylosing Spondylitis Disease Activity Index (BASDAI) and Ankylosing Spondylitis Disease Activity Score (ASDAS), functional status with the Bath Ankylosing Spondylitis Functional Index (BASFI), quality of life with the AS Quality of Life Questionnaire (ASQoL), and OAB-related symptoms with the Overactive Bladder Questionnaire Version 8 (OAB-V8). In the axSpA patient group, the incidence of OAB was 34.6% (n = 44), the mean and standard deviation OAB-V8 score was 8 ± 11, while in the control group it was 10.9% (n = 12) and the mean and standard deviation score was 4 ± 5 ( p < 0.001, p < 0.001). According to BASDAI, ASDAS-C-reaktive protein (ASDAS-CRP), and ASDAS-erythrocyte sedimentation rate (ASDAS-ESR) results, the differences in OAB-V8 scores between the patients with high and low disease activity were found to be significant ( p = 0.007, p = 0.039, p = 0.013). A significant difference was found in ASDAS-ESR ( p = 0.04), BASDAI ( p = 0.003), and BASFI ( p = 0.01) scores between patients with OAB symptoms compared to those without OAB symptoms. A significant correlation was observed between the patients' OAB-V8 score and BASDAI ( p < 0.001), ASDAS-CRP ( p < 0.001), ASDAS-ESR ( p < 0.001), BASFI ( p < 0.001) scores. It was determined that the quality of life of axSpA patients with OAB symptoms was negatively affected ( p < 0.001). The frequency of OAB was higher in axSpA patients than in the control group and showed significant associations with disease activity, functional impairment, and quality of life parameters.

items.titleZh: 中轴型脊柱关节炎诊断与严重程度及膀胱过度活动症的关系：一项横断面分析
items.abstractZh: 本研究旨在评估中轴型脊柱关节炎（axSpA）患者中膀胱过度活动症（OAB）的发生频率及其与疾病活动度的关系。研究纳入127例axSpA患者和110名符合年龄和性别标准的健康个体。记录并比较两组的人口学数据、实验室结果和临床参数。axSpA相关疾病活动度采用Bath强直性脊柱炎疾病活动指数（BASDAI）和强直性脊柱炎疾病活动评分（ASDAS）评估，功能状态采用Bath强直性脊柱炎功能指数（BASFI）评估，生活质量采用AS生活质量问卷（ASQoL）评估，OAB相关症状采用膀胱过度活动症问卷第8版（OAB-V8）评估。在axSpA患者组中，OAB的发生率为34.6%（n=44），OAB-V8评分的均值和标准差为8±11，而对照组为10.9%（n=12），均值和标准差为4±5（p<0.001，p<0.001）。根据BASDAI、ASDAS-C-反应蛋白（ASDAS-CRP）和ASDAS-红细胞沉降率（ASDAS-ESR）结果，高疾病活动度与低疾病活动度患者之间的OAB-V8评分差异显著（p=0.007，p=0.039，p=0.013）。有OAB症状的患者与无OAB症状的患者相比，ASDAS-ESR（p=0.04）、BASDAI（p=0.003）和BASFI（p=0.01）评分存在显著差异。患者OAB-V8评分与BASDAI（p<0.001）、ASDAS-CRP（p<0.001）、ASDAS-ESR（p<0.001）、BASFI（p<0.001）评分之间存在显著相关性。有OAB症状的axSpA患者的生活质量受到负面影响（p<0.001）。axSpA患者中OAB的发生率高于对照组，并与疾病活动度、功能损害和生活质量参数显著相关。

items.title: Pulmonary artery involvement in Behçet's disease patients: real-life data on aneurysm and thrombosis.
items.abstract: Pulmonary vascular involvement represents one of the most severe manifestations of Behçet's disease. Pulmonary artery aneurysm (PAA) and pulmonary artery thrombosis (PAT) are rare but potentially life-threatening complications. However, data regarding their frequency, coexistence, and clinical course remain limited, particularly from a pulmonology-based long-term follow-up perspective. To evaluate the frequency and clinical characteristics of PAA and PAT in a large single-center Behçet's disease cohort and to describe diagnostic and therapeutic challenges encountered during routine clinical practice. Retrospective single-center observational cohort study. Adult patients diagnosed with Behçet's disease and followed at a tertiary pulmonology center between January 2014 and January 2024 were retrospectively reviewed. Pulmonary vascular involvement was assessed using contrast-enhanced thoracic computed tomography and CT pulmonary angiography. The presence of deep vein thrombosis (DVT), treatment approaches, and clinical outcomes were recorded. Among 279 patients, pulmonary vascular involvement was identified in 9 patients. Pulmonary artery aneurysm was detected in three patients (1.07%), and pulmonary artery thrombosis in six patients (2.1%). Concomitant DVT was observed in a minority of patients with pulmonary vascular involvement. Clinical follow-up revealed heterogeneous disease courses, including aneurysm development during anticoagulant therapy, hemoptysis-related treatment discontinuation, persistent pulmonary thrombosis, and rare interventional complications such as late coil migration. Mortality occurred in patients with severe pulmonary vascular disease. Pulmonary vascular complications in Behçet's disease are rare but associated with significant morbidity and mortality. The coexistence of inflammatory and thrombotic processes creates substantial diagnostic and therapeutic challenges, particularly regarding anticoagulation strategies. Although the limited number of cases precludes definitive conclusions regarding pathogenetic mechanisms, our findings highlight the need for careful, individualized, and multidisciplinary management of pulmonary vascular involvement in Behçet's disease. Pulmonary Blood Vessel Problems in Behcet's Disease: A 10-Year Experience Behcet's disease is a chronic inflammatory condition that can affect blood vessels throughout the body. Although involvement of the lungs is uncommon, problems affecting the blood vessels in the lungs can be serious and sometimes life-threatening. These problems may include abnormal widening of the pulmonary arteries or the formation of blood clots within these vessels. In this study, we reviewed the medical records of patients with Behcet’s disease who were followed at our center over a 10-year period. Our aim was to better understand how often lung blood vessel problems occur, how they present clinically, and how they are managed in real-life practice. We also evaluated blood clots in the legs, which are common in Behcet’s disease and may coexist with lung involvement. We found that lung blood vessel complications were rare but associated with significant clinical challenges, including bleeding, treatment-related risks, and, in some cases, death. The clinical course varied considerably between patients, highlighting that there is no single approach suitable for all cases. Treatment decisions, particularly regarding the use of blood thinners, were often complex and had to be individualized. Our findings emphasize the importance of careful evaluation of lung symptoms in patients with Behcet’s disease and the need for close collaboration between different medical specialties. Early recognition and personalized management may help reduce serious complications and improve patient outcomes.

items.titleZh: 贝赫切特病患者肺动脉受累：关于动脉瘤和血栓形成的真实世界数据
items.abstractZh: 肺血管受累是贝赫切特病最严重的表现之一。肺动脉瘤（PAA）和肺动脉血栓形成（PAT）是罕见但可能危及生命的并发症。然而，关于其频率、共存性和临床病程的数据仍然有限，特别是从肺病学长期随访的角度。为了评估大型单中心贝赫切特病队列中PAA和PAT的频率和临床特征，并描述常规临床实践中遇到的诊断和治疗挑战。回顾性单中心观察性队列研究。回顾性分析了2014年1月至2024年1月期间在三级肺病中心诊断并随访的成年贝赫切特病患者。使用对比增强胸部计算机断层扫描和CT肺动脉造影评估肺血管受累。记录深静脉血栓形成（DVT）的存在、治疗方法和临床结局。在279例患者中，9例患者发现肺血管受累。3例患者（1.07%）检测到肺动脉瘤，6例患者（2.1%）检测到肺动脉血栓形成。少数肺血管受累患者观察到合并DVT。临床随访显示异质性病程，包括抗凝治疗期间动脉瘤发展、咯血相关治疗中断、持续性肺血栓以及罕见的介入并发症如晚期线圈迁移。死亡发生在严重肺血管疾病患者中。贝赫切特病的肺血管并发症罕见，但与显著的发病率和死亡率相关。炎症和血栓形成过程的共存造成了重大的诊断和治疗挑战，特别是在抗凝策略方面。尽管病例数量有限无法得出关于发病机制的明确结论，但我们的发现强调了在贝赫切特病中需要谨慎、个体化和多学科管理肺血管受累。贝赫切特病的肺血管问题：10年经验。贝赫切特病是一种慢性炎症性疾病，可影响全身血管。虽然肺部受累不常见，但影响肺血管的问题可能严重且有时危及生命。这些问题可能包括肺动脉异常扩张或这些血管内形成血凝块。在本研究中，我们回顾了在我们中心随访10年期间的贝赫切特病患者的医疗记录。我们的目的是更好地了解肺血管问题发生的频率、临床表现以及在实际实践中如何管理。我们还评估了腿部血凝块，这在贝赫切特病中常见，并可能与肺部受累共存。我们发现肺血管并发症罕见，但与显著的临床挑战相关，包括出血、治疗相关风险以及在某些情况下的死亡。患者之间的临床病程差异很大，强调没有适用于所有病例的单一方法。治疗决策，特别是关于使用血液稀释剂，通常复杂且必须个体化。我们的发现强调了在贝赫切特病患者中仔细评估肺部症状的重要性，以及不同医学专科之间密切合作的需要。早期识别和个性化管理可能有助于减少严重并发症并改善患者结局。

items.title: Juvenile idiopathic arthritis presenting with orbital pseudotumor: A rare pediatric association.
items.abstract: Orbital inflammatory pseudotumor is a rare, idiopathic condition characterized by nonspecific inflammation of orbital tissues. Juvenile idiopathic arthritis (JIA), a chronic autoimmune disease, may present with both systemic and extra-articular manifestations, including ocular involvement. This case highlights the importance of a multidisciplinary approach in the diagnosis and management of rare complications of JIA and underscores the need for further investigation into the relationship between systemic autoimmune disorders and localized inflammatory processes.

items.titleZh: 以眼眶假瘤为表现的幼年特发性关节炎：一种罕见的儿童关联。
items.abstractZh: 眼眶炎性假瘤是一种罕见的特发性疾病，其特征为眼眶组织的非特异性炎症。幼年特发性关节炎（JIA）是一种慢性自身免疫性疾病，可表现为全身性和关节外表现，包括眼部受累。本病例强调了多学科方法在诊断和管理JIA罕见并发症中的重要性，并突出了进一步研究系统性自身免疫性疾病与局部炎症过程之间关系的必要性。

items.title: Biomimetic M2 exosome-based dual-drug nanoplatform for combined immunomodulation and bone protection in rheumatoid arthritis.
items.abstract: The current treatment of rheumatoid arthritis (RA) remains limited by severe drug-associated side effects and poor suppression of bone erosion. Herein, we report the development of biomimetic nanoparticles (CEC NPs) that co-deliver celecoxib (CXB) and the lysine-specific demethylase 1 (LSD1) inhibitor CC-90011 via M2 macrophage-derived exosomes (M2 Exos), thereby integrating targeted delivery with innovative multi-mechanistic therapeutic strategies. The M2 Exos enable innate homing to inflamed synovium and osteoclast-rich lesions, while ensuring efficient intracellular delivery. CEC NPs combined repolarize macrophages from the M1 to M2 phenotype, suppress fibroblast-like synoviocyte activation, and critically inhibit bone erosion by blocking the LSD1-NFATc1 signaling pathway in the osteoclast. Collectively, these effects result in potent anti-inflammatory and osteoprotective outcomes. Notably, we identified CC-90011 as a previously unrecognized anti-erosive agent to directly suppress bone erosion in RA treatment. In a collagen-induced arthritis (CIA) model, CEC NPs markedly outperform monotherapies, with pronounced reduction in joint swelling, cartilage degradation, and bone erosion, without systemic toxicity. This work introduces an M2 Exo-based dual-drug delivery system as a versatile strategy for multi-mechanistic modulation of inflammation and bone destruction, offering a promising paradigm that could be extended to other inflammatory and autoimmune bone disorders.

items.titleZh: 基于仿生M2外泌体的双药纳米平台用于类风湿关节炎的免疫调节与骨保护联合治疗
items.abstractZh: 当前类风湿关节炎（RA）的治疗仍受限于严重的药物相关副作用和骨侵蚀抑制效果不佳。本文报道了一种仿生纳米颗粒（CEC NPs），通过M2巨噬细胞来源的外泌体（M2 Exos）共递送塞来昔布（CXB）和赖氨酸特异性去甲基化酶1（LSD1）抑制剂CC-90011，从而将靶向递送与创新的多机制治疗策略相结合。M2 Exos能够天然归巢至发炎的滑膜和富含破骨细胞的病灶，同时确保高效的细胞内递送。CEC NPs联合作用可将巨噬细胞从M1表型复极化为M2表型，抑制成纤维样滑膜细胞活化，并通过阻断破骨细胞中的LSD1-NFATc1信号通路关键性地抑制骨侵蚀。总体而言，这些效应产生了强效的抗炎和骨保护效果。值得注意的是，我们鉴定出CC-90011是一种先前未被认识的抗侵蚀药物，可直接抑制RA治疗中的骨侵蚀。在胶原诱导性关节炎（CIA）模型中，CEC NPs显著优于单一疗法，关节肿胀、软骨退化和骨侵蚀明显减轻，且无全身毒性。本工作引入了一种基于M2 Exo的双药递送系统，作为炎症和骨破坏多机制调节的通用策略，为其他炎症性和自身免疫性骨疾病提供了有前景的范例。

items.title: Analysis of an acute care surgery service performing temporal artery biopsy for suspected giant cell arteritis.
items.abstract: Temporal artery biopsy (TAB) for suspected giant cell arteritis (GCA) represents an infrequent but important inpatient consultation for acute care surgery (ACS) services. Given the morbidity associated with delayed treatment, corticosteroids are often initiated before biopsy, raising questions about the diagnostic utility and impact of TAB in contemporary practice. We performed a review of all inpatient TABs completed by an ACS service at a tertiary center between March 2015 and January 2024 to characterize case volume, pathology results, and influence of biopsy findings on corticosteroid management. Sixty-four patients underwent TAB, the majority of whom were elderly and female, with visual symptoms and headache being the most common presenting complaints. Nearly all patients were initiated on high-dose corticosteroids prior to biopsy, with a median of two days between ACS consultation and procedure. Pathologic findings confirmed GCA in 10% of cases, with additional biopsies demonstrating intimal fibroplasia or equivocal inflammatory changes. Despite widespread steroid initiation, biopsy results influenced discharge management, as patients with negative pathology were more likely to undergo corticosteroid tapering prior to or shortly after discharge. The median American College of Rheumatology 1990 classification score was three, with just over half of patients meeting criteria for GCA. No TABs were performed during 2020, but biopsy volume increased substantially in the post-COVID period. These findings suggest that ACS services play an important role in the diagnostic evaluation of suspected GCA. Although corticosteroid therapy is frequently initiated prior to biopsy, TAB continues to yield clinically meaningful information that informs subsequent management decisions.

items.titleZh: 急性护理外科服务对疑似巨细胞动脉炎进行颞动脉活检的分析
items.abstractZh: 颞动脉活检（TAB）用于疑似巨细胞动脉炎（GCA）是急性护理外科（ACS）服务中一种不常见但重要的住院会诊。鉴于延迟治疗相关的发病率，皮质类固醇通常在活检前开始使用，这引发了关于TAB在当代实践中诊断效用和影响的问题。我们对2015年3月至2024年1月期间由一家三级中心的ACS服务完成的所有住院TAB进行了回顾，以描述病例量、病理结果以及活检结果对皮质类固醇管理的影响。64名患者接受了TAB，其中大多数为老年女性，视觉症状和头痛是最常见的主诉。几乎所有患者在活检前都开始使用高剂量皮质类固醇，从ACS会诊到手术的中位时间为两天。病理结果在10%的病例中确认了GCA，其他活检显示内膜纤维增生或不确定的炎症变化。尽管广泛使用类固醇，活检结果影响了出院管理，因为病理阴性的患者更可能在出院前或出院后不久进行皮质类固醇减量。美国风湿病学会1990年分类评分中位数为3，略超过一半的患者符合GCA标准。2020年未进行任何TAB，但COVID后时期活检量显著增加。这些发现表明，ACS服务在疑似GCA的诊断评估中发挥重要作用。尽管皮质类固醇治疗常在活检前开始，但TAB仍能提供临床有意义的信息，指导后续管理决策。

items.title: Decoding the lipid etiology of atherogenic index of plasma and gout: establishing the causal role of triglycerides through NHANES, Mendelian randomization, and network pharmacology.
items.abstract: Although a cross-sectional relation between the atherogenic index of plasma (AIP) and gout has been well documented, the causal roles of its principal components, TG and HDL-C, have not yet been clearly established. Therefore, this study sought to explicate the causal relations between AIP, its individual constituents, and the risk of gout, as well as to investigate the potential molecular mechanisms underlying these associations. We adopted an integrated analytical pipeline. First, mediation and cross-sectional analyses were carried out to quantify the phenotypic associations of TG, HDL-C, and AIP with gout. Second, both multivariable and univariable Mendelian randomization (MR) analyses were applied to assess causal directions. Finally, a network pharmacology approach was applied to construct interaction networks linking lipid-related factors with gout, and subsequent enrichment analyses were done to identify the main biological pathways involved and key genes were identified using the Icelandic database's pQTLs. AIP showed a significant positive link with gout prevalence (OR = 1.700, p = 0.010), with this relationship being mediated mainly by HDL-C (45.19%), rather than TG or LDL-C. Univariable MR analyses indicated that TG exerted a substantial causal effect on gout risk (OR = 1.0058, p < 0.001). Although univariable MR showed a nominally protective association for HDLC (OR = 0.623, 95% CI: 0.399-0.974, p = 0.042), this effect was attenuated and became statistically nonsignificant after multivariable adjustment for other lipid traits (p > 0.05). After adjustment for genetic correlations in multivariable MR analyses, TG remained the sole lipid trait with a robust and independent causal effect on gout (OR = 1.0077, p < 0.001), whereas neither HDL-C nor LDL-C reached statistical significance. The TG-specific gout-associated gene set (Group B) was significantly enriched in T-cell receptor and NF-κB signaling pathways, with hub genes including PTPRC, MYD88, and LCK, supporting a direct lipid-immune axis. By contrast, the combined TG/HDL-C gene set (Group F) showed predominant enrichment in PI3K-Akt and cytokine-cytokine receptor pathways, whereas genes uniquely shared between HDL-C and gout (Group C) were mainly enriched in fundamental cellular processes without marked inflammatory pathway involvement. AIP exhibits a non-linear positive association with gout, but this association is primarily mediated by HDL‑C, which itself has no independent causal protective effect. TG may play an independent causal role in gout, potentially involving T‑cell receptor/NF‑κB signaling pathways. However, these findings are exploratory and require further validation.

items.title: Chromogenic factor X-guided warfarin monitoring in lupus anticoagulant-positive primary antiphospholipid syndrome with adrenal hemorrhage and progressive deep vein thrombosis: a case report.
items.abstract: Antiphospholipid syndrome (APS) is a thrombotic autoimmune disorder; adrenal hemorrhage is uncommon. Treating progressive thrombosis with concurrent major bleeding is challenging, especially when lupus anticoagulant (LA) may compromise international normalized ratio (INR)-based warfarin monitoring. A 32-year-old Chinese man had isolated marked activated partial thromboplastin time prolongation detected preoperatively 4 years earlier. He showed persistent LA positivity and high-titer anticardiolipin and anti-β2-glycoprotein I antibodies, but no thrombosis was documented and he was lost to follow-up. One year before the current admission, he developed extensive lower-limb deep vein thrombosis (DVT) after a left ankle sprain, followed days later by right-sided lower back/flank pain. Computed tomography showed right adrenal hemorrhage with adjacent perirenal extension. Anticoagulation was withheld because of bleeding, and an inferior vena cava filter was placed. He was readmitted 2 days later with worsening pain, progressive bilateral DVT, thrombocytopenia, markedly elevated D-dimer, and persistent triple-positive antiphospholipid antibodies. After multidisciplinary review, endovascular embolization was performed for local hemostatic control. Anticoagulation was then escalated from reduced-dose enoxaparin to therapeutic-dose enoxaparin, approximately 1 mg/kg every 12 h, and warfarin was initiated. Because LA raised concern regarding INR reliability, chromogenic factor X (CFX) activity was used to guide warfarin monitoring, with a target range of 20%-40%. At 6 months, imaging showed near-complete hematoma absorption and venous recanalization, without recurrent major bleeding or new thrombosis. In selected LA-positive APS patients with competing risks of thrombosis and adrenal hemorrhage, endovascular hemostasis followed by cautious anticoagulation escalation and CFX-guided warfarin monitoring may be feasible when INR monitoring is potentially unreliable.

items.title: Gastrointestinal perforation due to lupus enteritis in early-stage systemic lupus erythematosus.
items.abstract: Lupus enteritis (LE) is an uncommon gastrointestinal (GI) manifestation of systemic lupus erythematosus (SLE) and GI perforation is a rare, but a severe complication of LE that is typically found in patients with high disease activity and a long disease duration. Herein, we present the case of a previously healthy 31-year-old Thai man who developed SLE complicated by LE. He was admitted to our hospital with refractory thrombocytopenia despite initial treatment with high-dose prednisolone, mycophenolate mofetil, and plasma exchange. Although the abdominal pain initially improved, residual pain persisted in the left side of the abdomen at the time of transfer. The abdominal pain gradually worsened despite starting rituximab therapy. Colonoscopy revealed extensive necrosis of the descending colon, and contrast-enhanced abdominal computed tomography revealed colonic perforation. Emergency surgery revealed ischemia extending from the distal transverse, to an entirely perforated descending colon. Histopathological findings suggested that the colonic perforation was attributable to SLE-associated mesenteric vasculitis. The LE did not recur postoperatively. Because LE might lead to GI perforation even during the early stages of SLE, patients with high disease activity and persistent abdominal pain should be closely monitored, and treatment should be promptly escalated given the potential risk of perforation.

items.title: Infective Endocarditis Presenting With Scalp Allodynia and a Giant Cell Arteritis-Like Vasculitic Phenotype.
items.abstract: BACKGROUND The clinical manifestations of infective endocarditis (IE) are highly varied, and diagnostic delays are common and potentially life-threatening. Due to their overlapping clinical presentations, IE may be misdiagnosed as giant cell arteritis (GCA). Although IE mimics GCA, scalp allodynia associated with IE has not previously been reported. CASE REPORT A 60-year-old man with mitral valve prolapse presented with fever, generalized stiffness, and low back pain refractory to oral antibiotics and low-dose glucocorticoids. He also reported a stinging sensation on his scalp while washing his hair, consistent with scalp allodynia. Prednisolone was initiated for presumed GCA. However, blood cultures subsequently grew Streptococcus parasanguinis, and imaging studies showed hematogenous dissemination. Ultimately, IE was confirmed based on the modified Duke Criteria. All symptoms, including scalp allodynia, resolved completely following the initiation of antibiotic therapy. CONCLUSIONS This case highlights that scalp allodynia, while characteristic of GCA, can also occur in IE, and underscores the limitations of relying solely on clinical symptoms when differentiating GCA from infectious etiologies. In patients with fever and scalp allodynia-particularly those with predisposing cardiac conditions-IE warrants strong consideration. Blood cultures should be obtained before initiating glucocorticoid therapy, and early clinical reassessment is critical to avoid the potentially catastrophic consequences of missed or delayed IE diagnosis.

items.titleZh: 以头皮异常性疼痛和巨细胞动脉炎样血管炎表型为表现的感染性心内膜炎
items.abstractZh: BACKGROUND 感染性心内膜炎（IE）的临床表现高度多样，诊断延迟常见且可能危及生命。由于临床表现重叠，IE可能被误诊为巨细胞动脉炎（GCA）。尽管IE类似GCA，但与IE相关的头皮异常性疼痛此前未见报道。CASE REPORT 一名60岁男性，有二尖瓣脱垂病史，表现为发热、全身僵硬和腰痛，对口服抗生素和低剂量糖皮质激素无效。他还报告洗头时头皮有刺痛感，符合头皮异常性疼痛。因疑似GCA开始使用泼尼松龙。然而，随后血培养培养出副血链球菌，影像学检查显示血源性播散。最终，根据改良Duke标准确诊为IE。所有症状，包括头皮异常性疼痛，在开始抗生素治疗后完全缓解。CONCLUSIONS 本病例强调，头皮异常性疼痛虽然是GCA的特征，但也可能发生在IE中，并强调了仅依靠临床症状区分GCA与感染性病因的局限性。对于发热和头皮异常性疼痛的患者——尤其是那些有易感心脏疾病的患者——应强烈考虑IE。在开始糖皮质激素治疗前应进行血培养，早期临床重新评估对于避免漏诊或延迟诊断IE可能带来的灾难性后果至关重要。

items.title: Comparative Effectiveness of a Nurse-Led Care Model vs Usual Care in Rheumatoid Arthritis: A Longitudinal Cohort Study of Clinical Outcomes and Patient Adherence.
items.abstract: BACKGROUND Achieving clinical remission in rheumatoid arthritis (RA) requires intensive monitoring and high patient adherence. While nurse-led care (NC) integrates specialized disease education and proactive monitoring, its association with long-term outcomes in real-world settings requires further investigation. This study aimed to examine the association between a specialized NC model and clinical remission rates over a 12-month period relative to usual care (UC) and standard pharmacotherapy (NO). MATERIAL AND METHODS This retrospective longitudinal cohort study analyzed 415 RA patients (NC: n=103; UC: n=132; NO: n=180) following treat-to-target protocols. Primary outcome was the association with clinical remission (disease activity score 28 with erythrocyte sedimentation rate [DAS28-ESR] <2.6) at 12 months. RESULTS At 12 months, the NC group exhibited a higher remission rate (41.7%) compared with the UC (28.0%) and NO (17.8%) groups (P<0.001). After adjusting for baseline disease activity and socioeconomic factors, the NC model was identified as a significant independent predictor of remission compared with NO (aOR 2.85) and UC (aOR 1.66). Longitudinal data showed a more pronounced decrease in mean DAS28-ESR within the NC group, correlated with improvements in objective joint counts and subjective assessments. High behavioral adherence was noted in the NC group, with laboratory compliance and medication persistence significantly exceeding that in the NO group (P<0.01). CONCLUSIONS Participation in a specialized NC model is strongly associated with an increased likelihood of clinical remission and superior patient adherence in RA. These findings suggest that integrated nursing support may serve as a beneficial framework correlated with the successful attainment of treat-to-target goals.

items.titleZh: 护士主导的护理模式与常规护理在类风湿关节炎中的比较效果：一项关于临床结局和患者依从性的纵向队列研究
items.abstractZh: BACKGROUND 实现类风湿关节炎（RA）的临床缓解需要密集监测和高患者依从性。虽然护士主导的护理（NC）整合了专科疾病教育和主动监测，但其在真实世界环境中与长期结局的关联需要进一步研究。本研究旨在探讨专科NC模式与常规护理（UC）和标准药物治疗（NO）相比，在12个月内与临床缓解率的关联。MATERIAL AND METHODS 这项回顾性纵向队列研究分析了415例RA患者（NC组：n=103；UC组：n=132；NO组：n=180），均遵循达标治疗策略。主要结局是与12个月时临床缓解（疾病活动评分28-红细胞沉降率[DAS28-ESR] <2.6）的关联。RESULTS 在12个月时，NC组显示出更高的缓解率（41.7%），而UC组为28.0%，NO组为17.8%（P<0.001）。在调整基线疾病活动和社会经济因素后，与NO相比（aOR 2.85），与UC相比（aOR 1.66），NC模型被确定为缓解的显著独立预测因子。纵向数据显示NC组平均DAS28-ESR下降更明显，与客观关节计数和主观评估的改善相关。NC组观察到高行为依从性，实验室依从性和药物持续性显著高于NO组（P<0.01）。CONCLUSIONS 参与专科NC模型与RA临床缓解可能性增加和患者依从性提高密切相关。这些发现表明，整合护理支持可能作为与成功实现达标治疗目标相关的有益框架。

items.title: New-onset Systemic Lupus Erythematosus after Methimazole Exposure Followed by Autoantibody Emergence.
items.abstract: Methimazole-associated new-onset systemic lupus erythematosus (SLE) is rare and it may be difficult to distinguish from classic drug-induced lupus. We report a 19-year-old man who developed fever, polyarthralgia, rash, and ocular pain three months after initiating methimazole for Graves' disease. At symptom onset, antinuclear antibodies and ANCA were negative, and there was no hypocomplementemia. Despite methimazole withdrawal, inflammation persisted. During the subsequent clinical course, ANA and MPO-ANCA became positive, in conjunction with the emergence of anti-double-stranded DNA antibody and hypocomplementemia, thus fulfilling the classification criteria for SLE. Early seronegativity does not exclude evolving SLE and represents an important diagnostic pitfall. Clinicians should be aware that MPO-ANCA positivity may further complicate the differential diagnosis in such cases.

items.titleZh: 甲巯咪唑暴露后新发系统性红斑狼疮并随后出现自身抗体
items.abstractZh: 甲巯咪唑相关的新发系统性红斑狼疮（SLE）罕见，且可能难以与经典药物性狼疮区分。我们报告一例19岁男性，因Graves病开始服用甲巯咪唑三个月后出现发热、多关节痛、皮疹和眼痛。症状出现时，抗核抗体和ANCA均为阴性，且无低补体血症。尽管停用甲巯咪唑，炎症仍持续存在。在随后的临床过程中，ANA和MPO-ANCA转为阳性，同时出现抗双链DNA抗体和低补体血症，从而符合SLE的分类标准。早期血清学阴性不能排除进展中的SLE，这是一个重要的诊断陷阱。临床医生应意识到，MPO-ANCA阳性可能进一步使此类病例的鉴别诊断复杂化。

items.title: Disseminated Varicella-Zoster Virus Infection Following a Live Attenuated Varicella Vaccine (Oka Strain) in a Patient with Rheumatoid Arthritis: A Case Report.
items.abstract: A 77-year-old woman was being treated for rheumatoid arthritis with prednisolone, methotrexate, and iguratimod. The patient was administered a live-attenuated varicella vaccine (Oka strain) for herpes zoster prevention by a primary care physician. Four weeks later, a vesicular rash appeared on the body. The patient was treated with amenamevir, and the rash improved. Based on the pathological findings and viral genotyping, she was diagnosed with a vaccine-induced disseminated varicella-zoster virus infection. For herpes zoster vaccination, caution is warranted as some medical questionnaires for vaccination do not include glucocorticoid use or immunosuppressive therapy, and some primary care physicians administer live vaccines only.

items.titleZh: 一例类风湿关节炎患者接种水痘减毒活疫苗（Oka株）后发生播散性水痘-带状疱疹病毒感染：病例报告
items.abstractZh: 一名77岁女性因类风湿关节炎接受泼尼松龙、甲氨蝶呤和艾拉莫德治疗。该患者由初级保健医生接种了水痘减毒活疫苗（Oka株）以预防带状疱疹。四周后，躯干出现水疱性皮疹。患者接受阿米那韦治疗，皮疹好转。根据病理结果和病毒基因分型，诊断为疫苗诱导的播散性水痘-带状疱疹病毒感染。对于带状疱疹疫苗接种需谨慎，因为部分疫苗接种问卷未包含糖皮质激素使用或免疫抑制治疗，且部分初级保健医生仅接种活疫苗。

items.title: Atypical Presentation of Microscopic Polyangiitis with Pericarditis Manifesting as Right-Sided Heart Failure.
items.abstract: Microscopic polyangiitis (MPA) is an ANCA-associated vasculitis that affects multiple organs. However, cardiac involvement is rare in these patients. We herein report a rare case of MPA presenting with marked peripheral edema and weight gain due to acute pericarditis with borderline tamponade physiology and possible effusive-constrictive features, resulting in right-sided heart failure. Myeloperoxidase-ANCA was strongly positive, and the patient subsequently developed rapidly progressive renal dysfunction. A renal biopsy revealed pauci-immune crescentic glomerulonephritis, confirming the diagnosis of MPA. This case highlights pericarditis with pericardial compressive syndrome as an atypical initial manifestation of MPA.

items.title: Clinical response to firsekibart in a 73-year-old patient with tophaceous gout complicated by prostate cancer and chronic kidney disease: a case report.
items.abstract: The management of acute gout flares in elderly patients with multiple comorbidities remains a significant clinical challenge. Although interleukin-1β (IL-1β) inhibitors are recommended for refractory gout when conventional therapies are unsuitable, evidence remains limited regarding their use in patients with active malignancy and moderate-to-severe renal impairment. This case addresses the knowledge gap in balancing potent anti-inflammatory therapy with complex oncological and renal risks. We report a case of a 73-year-old male patient with refractory gout, a disease duration exceeding 20 years, and extensive tophus formation. The patient was concomitantly diagnosed with acinar adenocarcinoma of the prostate, stage 3 chronic kidney disease (CKD), coronary artery disease, and grade 3 hypertension. Due to recurrent acute gout flares, impaired renal function, and a high risk of bleeding, standard anti-inflammatory therapeutic options were contraindicated. After a comprehensive assessment of the potential risks and benefits, treatment was initiated with firsekibart, a novel fully human monoclonal antibody targeting IL-1β, administered as a single 200 mg subcutaneous injection, in combination with a short course of low-dose glucocorticoids. Urate-lowering therapy with febuxostat was subsequently introduced. Marked relief of joint pain and swelling was observed within 24 hours of treatment. During the 3-month follow-up period, inflammatory markers improved substantially, with high-sensitivity C-reactive protein decreasing from 62.36 to 0.9 mg/L. Target serum urate levels were achieved (444.9 µmol/L), and renal function showed improvement, as evidenced by an increase in the estimated glomerular filtration rate from 36.4 to 44.9 mL/min/1.73 m 2 . No evidence of tumor progression, serious infections, or major cardiovascular adverse events was observed in the follow-up period. This case suggests that firsekibart may provide rapid and effective inflammation control in high-risk gout populations where standard treatments are limited. These findings highlight the potential of IL-1β targeted therapy as a precision medicine approach for complex patients; however, larger prospective studies are required to validate the long-term oncological and renal safety profile of firsekibart in this population.

items.titleZh: 73岁痛风石性痛风合并前列腺癌及慢性肾病患者对firsekibart的临床应答：一例病例报告
items.abstractZh: 老年多合并症患者急性痛风发作的管理仍是重大临床挑战。尽管白细胞介素-1β（IL-1β）抑制剂被推荐用于常规治疗不适用时的难治性痛风，但其在活动性恶性肿瘤和中重度肾功能损害患者中的应用证据仍然有限。本病例填补了在复杂肿瘤和肾脏风险中平衡强效抗炎治疗的知识空白。我们报告一例73岁男性患者，患有难治性痛风，病程超过20年，并伴有广泛痛风石形成。患者同时诊断为前列腺腺泡腺癌、3期慢性肾病（CKD）、冠状动脉疾病和3级高血压。由于反复急性痛风发作、肾功能受损及高出血风险，标准抗炎治疗方案存在禁忌。在全面评估潜在风险和获益后，开始使用firsekibart（一种靶向IL-1β的新型全人源单克隆抗体）治疗，单次皮下注射200 mg，联合短期低剂量糖皮质激素。随后引入非布司他进行降尿酸治疗。治疗后24小时内观察到关节疼痛和肿胀显著缓解。在3个月随访期间，炎症标志物显著改善，高敏C反应蛋白从62.36 mg/L降至0.9 mg/L。达到目标血清尿酸水平（444.9 µmol/L），肾功能改善，估算肾小球滤过率从36.4 mL/min/1.73 m²升至44.9 mL/min/1.73 m²。随访期间未观察到肿瘤进展、严重感染或主要心血管不良事件。本病例提示，在标准治疗受限的高危痛风人群中，firsekibart可能提供快速有效的炎症控制。这些发现凸显了IL-1β靶向治疗作为复杂患者精准医学方法的潜力；然而，需要更大规模的前瞻性研究来验证firsekibart在该人群中的长期肿瘤和肾脏安全性。

items.title: Developing a patient-educator program for adolescents with juvenile arthritis: exploring motivation sources, barriers, and facilitators.
items.abstract: Patients can be valuable contributors to medical education, offering nuanced perspective and guidance, based on lived experience. While numerous training programs have integrated adult patients in this manner, very few have engaged adolescent patients. Recognizing adolescent educators may be particularly helpful in teaching pediatric conditions, this study appraises the potential for including those with juvenile arthritis in pediatric rheumatology training. Using an exploratory qualitative approach, we conducted semi-structured interviews with adolescents with juvenile arthritis receiving treatment at two tertiary-care pediatric centres in Canada about the motivations, perceptions, facilitators, and barriers that influence their engagement as patient educators. The interview transcripts were analyzed using an iterative qualitative descriptive method. Participants ( n = 19, aged 13-18) identified intrinsic factors, such as learning about their condition and socializing with peers, and extrinsic factors, such as helping students learn and promoting greater disease awareness, as relevant drivers for participating as patient educators. They pointed to balancing school and medical appointments, transportation, and discomfort with sharing personal experiences in large groups as barriers. Parental support, accruing volunteer hours, and engaging health professionals in the teaching sessions were seen as facilitators that could meaningfully enhance the relevance and impact of adolescents' contributions to medical education. Adolescents with juvenile arthritis are motivated to participate as patient educators. Understanding the factors that promote their involvement supports the development of training initiatives involving adolescents that are likely to be successful and sustainable. Les patients peuvent apporter une contribution précieuse à la formation médicale, en offrant une perspective nuancée et des conseils fondés sur leur expérience vécue. Si de nombreux programmes de formation ont intégré des patients adultes de cette manière, très peu ont fait appel à des patients adolescents. Reconnaissant que les adolescents éducateurs peuvent être particulièrement utiles pour enseigner les pathologies pédiatriques, cette étude évalue le potentiel d’inclure des adolescents atteints d’arthrite juvénile dans la formation en rhumatologie pédiatrique. À l’aide d’une approche qualitative exploratoire, nous avons mené des entretiens semi-structurés auprès d’adolescents atteints d’arthrite juvénile et suivis dans deux centres pédiatriques de soins tertiaires au Canada, afin d’évaluer les motivations, les perceptions, les facteurs facilitants et les obstacles qui influencent leur engagement en tant que patients-éducateurs. Les transcriptions des entretiens ont été analysées à l’aide d’une méthode descriptive qualitative itérative. Les participants (n = 19, âgés de 13 à 18 ans) ont identifié des facteurs intrinsèques, tels que l’apprentissage de leur pathologie et la socialisation avec leurs pairs, ainsi que des facteurs extrinsèques, tels que le fait d’aider les étudiants à apprendre et de promouvoir une meilleure sensibilisation à la maladie, comme des motivations pertinentes pour participer en tant que patients-éducateurs. Ils ont cité comme obstacles la conciliation entre l’école et les rendez-vous médicaux, les problèmes de transport et la gêne liée au partage d’expériences personnelles au sein de grands groupes. Le soutien parental, l’accumulation d’heures de bénévolat et l’implication de professionnels de santé dans les séances pédagogiques ont été considérés comme des facteurs facilitants susceptibles d’améliorer de manière significative la pertinence et l’impact de la contribution des adolescents à la formation médicale. Les adolescents atteints d’arthrite juvénile sont motivés à participer en tant que patients-éducateurs. La compréhension des facteurs favorisant leur implication contribue à l’élaboration d’initiatives de formation impliquant des adolescents, qui ont de bonnes chances d’être couronnées de succès et durables. .

items.titleZh: 为青少年关节炎患者开发患者教育者项目：探索动机来源、障碍和促进因素。
items.abstractZh: 患者可以为医学教育做出宝贵贡献，基于生活经验提供细致入微的视角和指导。虽然许多培训项目以这种方式整合了成年患者，但很少有项目涉及青少年患者。认识到青少年教育者在教授儿科疾病方面可能特别有帮助，本研究评估了将青少年关节炎患者纳入儿科风湿病学培训的潜力。采用探索性定性方法，我们对在加拿大两个三级儿科中心接受治疗的青少年关节炎患者进行了半结构化访谈，探讨影响他们作为患者教育者参与的动机、看法、促进因素和障碍。访谈记录采用迭代定性描述方法进行分析。参与者（n=19，年龄13-18岁）确定了内在因素，如了解自身状况和与同龄人社交，以及外在因素，如帮助学生学习和促进疾病意识提高，作为参与患者教育者的相关驱动因素。他们指出平衡学校与医疗预约、交通以及在大群体中分享个人经历的不适感是障碍。家长支持、积累志愿者小时数以及让卫生专业人员参与教学课程被视为促进因素，这些因素可以显著提高青少年对医学教育贡献的相关性和影响力。青少年关节炎患者有动力作为患者教育者参与。理解促进他们参与的因素有助于制定涉及青少年的培训计划，这些计划可能成功且可持续。

items.title: Dermatomyositis With Necrotizing Vasculitis, Pulmonary Arterial Hypertension, and Extensive Calcinosis Following Delayed Diagnosis.
items.abstract: Dermatomyositis is a rare autoimmune inflammatory disease with a highly heterogeneous clinical presentation and potential for multisystem involvement. Early diagnosis may be challenging, particularly in patients presenting with amyopathic disease and limited initial laboratory abnormalities. We report the case of a 45-year-old woman initially diagnosed with amyopathic dermatomyositis based on characteristic cutaneous manifestations in the absence of objective muscle involvement on laboratory testing and electromyography. After being lost to follow-up for four years, she presented with progressive proximal muscle weakness, extensive ulcerative calcinosis, Raynaud phenomenon, and exertional dyspnea. Extended myositis serology revealed anti-Mi-2 and anti-signal recognition particle (SRP) antibodies. Muscle biopsy demonstrated perifascicular atrophy, necrotizing vasculitis, and foreign-body granulomatous inflammation associated with dystrophic calcinosis. Right heart catheterization confirmed pre-capillary pulmonary arterial hypertension in the absence of interstitial lung disease. The patient was treated with intravenous cyclophosphamide, pulmonary vasodilator therapy, colchicine, and tapering corticosteroids, resulting in clinical and functional improvement. This case highlights the potential progression of initially amyopathic dermatomyositis to severe systemic disease, the limitations of isolated serological assessment, and the importance of long-term follow-up. It also illustrates several uncommon manifestations of adult dermatomyositis, including extensive calcinosis, pulmonary arterial hypertension, and histologically proven necrotizing vasculitis, supporting the concept of dermatomyositis as a systemic vasculopathic disorder.

items.titleZh: 延迟诊断后出现坏死性血管炎、肺动脉高压和广泛钙化的皮肌炎
items.abstractZh: 皮肌炎是一种罕见的自身免疫性炎症性疾病，临床表现高度异质，可能累及多个系统。早期诊断可能具有挑战性，尤其是在表现为无肌病性皮肌炎且初始实验室检查异常有限的病例中。我们报告一例45岁女性患者，最初根据特征性皮肤表现，在实验室检查和肌电图未发现客观肌肉受累的情况下，诊断为无肌病性皮肌炎。失访四年后，她出现进行性近端肌无力、广泛溃疡性钙质沉着、雷诺现象和劳力性呼吸困难。扩展的肌炎血清学检测显示抗Mi-2和抗信号识别颗粒（SRP）抗体阳性。肌肉活检显示束周萎缩、坏死性血管炎以及与营养不良性钙化相关的异物肉芽肿性炎症。右心导管检查证实存在毛细血管前性肺动脉高压，且无间质性肺病。患者接受静脉环磷酰胺、肺血管扩张剂治疗、秋水仙碱和逐渐减量的皮质类固醇治疗，临床和功能得到改善。本病例强调了最初无肌病性皮肌炎可能进展为严重系统性疾病的潜在风险、孤立血清学评估的局限性以及长期随访的重要性。同时，它也展示了成人皮肌炎的几种罕见表现，包括广泛钙质沉着、肺动脉高压和组织学证实的坏死性血管炎，支持皮肌炎作为一种系统性血管病变的概念。

items.title: Atypical Lower Extremity Discoid Lupus Erythematosus Associated With Newly Diagnosed Systemic Lupus Erythematosus in a Male Patient: A Case Report.
items.abstract: Discoid lupus erythematosus (DLE) classically affects sun‑exposed areas, such as the face, scalp, and ears. Involvement of the lower extremities is uncommon, and presentation of DLE in association with systemic lupus erythematosus (SLE) in a male patient is relatively rare. This case report describes a 34‑year‑old man who presented with chronic, scaly, dyspigmented plaques confined to both the lower legs, which prompted further evaluation and led to the diagnosis of SLE. Histopathological evaluation supported the diagnosis of DLE, while serologic workup revealed high‑titer antinuclear antibodies (ANAs), anti‑double‑stranded DNA (anti‑dsDNA), anti‑Smith antibodies, and hypocomplementemia, supporting a diagnosis of SLE with chronic cutaneous lupus involvement. Following treatment with strict photoprotection, topical corticosteroids, and weight‑based hydroxychloroquine, the patient showed marked clinical and serologic improvement at the 12‑week and 9‑month follow‑ups. This case highlights the importance of evaluating for systemic involvement in patients with biopsy‑supported DLE, particularly when lesions occur in atypical anatomical locations and in populations traditionally considered at lower risk.

items.titleZh: 男性患者新诊断系统性红斑狼疮相关的非典型下肢盘状红斑狼疮：一例病例报告
items.abstractZh: 盘状红斑狼疮（DLE）典型累及日光暴露区域，如面部、头皮和耳朵。下肢受累不常见，且男性患者中DLE与系统性红斑狼疮（SLE）同时出现相对罕见。本病例报告描述了一名34岁男性，表现为局限于双下肢的慢性、鳞屑性、色素异常斑块，这促使进一步评估并最终诊断为SLE。组织病理学评估支持DLE诊断，而血清学检查显示高滴度抗核抗体（ANA）、抗双链DNA（抗dsDNA）、抗Smith抗体及低补体血症，支持SLE伴慢性皮肤狼疮受累的诊断。经过严格光防护、外用糖皮质激素及基于体重的羟氯喹治疗后，患者在12周和9个月随访时显示出显著的临床和血清学改善。本病例强调了在活检证实的DLE患者中评估系统性受累的重要性，尤其是当皮损出现在非典型解剖部位且患者属于传统认为低风险人群时。

items.title: [A case of eosinophilic granulomatosis with polyangiitis presenting with characteristic endoscopic findings in the esophagus and stomach].
items.abstract: A woman in her 60s presented with abdominal pain and diarrhea. She had a history of asthma and sinusitis and developed a skin rash and numbness in the lower extremities. Laboratory tests revealed marked eosinophilia, leading to a diagnosis of eosinophilic granulomatosis with polyangiitis (EGPA). Esophagogastroduodenoscopy showed longitudinal erosion in the thoracic esophagus and mucosal color changes ranging from pale to bronze tones in the stomach, extending from the antrum to the angular region. These changes became more evident with insufflation and were not accompanied by inflammatory changes in the mucosa. Given the rarity of reports of esophageal and gastric involvement in EGPA, and to our knowledge, no case has demonstrated insufflation-dependent mucosal changes, this case is noteworthy.

items.titleZh: [一例以食管和胃特征性内镜表现为表现的嗜酸性肉芽肿性多血管炎病例]。
items.abstractZh: 一名60多岁女性因腹痛和腹泻就诊。她有哮喘和鼻窦炎病史，并出现皮疹和下肢麻木。实验室检查显示显著嗜酸性粒细胞增多，诊断为嗜酸性肉芽肿性多血管炎（EGPA）。食管胃十二指肠镜检查显示胸段食管纵向糜烂，以及胃内从胃窦到胃角区域黏膜颜色从苍白到青铜色的变化。这些变化在充气时更加明显，且不伴有黏膜炎症改变。鉴于EGPA累及食管和胃的报道罕见，且据我们所知，尚无病例显示充气依赖性黏膜变化，因此本病例值得关注。

items.title: Patient reports of evaluations for interstitial lung disease in patients with connective tissue diseases and rheumatoid arthritis: an international survey.
items.abstract: Connective tissue diseases (CTDs) and rheumatoid arthritis (RA) share the pulmonary complication of interstitial lung disease (ILD). However, real-world data on patient perspectives and experience regarding screening and evaluations for ILD following CTD/RA diagnosis are limited. We conducted an international, cross-sectional online survey of patients self-reporting as having confirmed CTDs and RA to understand their experience of lung manifestations and ILD screening and/or evaluations. Respondents aged ≥18 years with self-reported CTDs/RA with and without ILD were engaged across Africa and Turkey, Europe, Japan and the Americas. Of 2,225 respondents, 54% were from Europe and 82% were female. Mean ± standard deviation (SD) age was 55 ± 11.6 years. Mean (SD) time from first symptoms to diagnosis with CTD/RA was 14.78 ± 11.37 years. On average, respondents experienced a delay of about 2 years before they were diagnosed with CTD/RA after experiencing their first symptoms. Mean (SD) time from CTD/RA diagnosis to diagnosis with lung conditions was 9.61 ± 10.09 years. Lung screening/evaluations were reported to have been done by 70% of all respondents, mostly as a general or routine status check (39%). Chest high-resolution computed tomography (HRCT) and pulmonary function tests (PFTs) were the most recalled tests to evaluate the lungs for ILD (both 50%), especially among respondents with systemic sclerosis (73% and 87%, respectively). Among respondents who recalled lung evaluation by chest HRCT scan or PFTs, tests were carried out every 1-2 years. Most survey respondents (87%) rated lung screening/evaluations as important. The survey demonstrated mixed experiences of evaluations for lung manifestations and ILD among patients with CTDs/RA, attributable to differences in the risk of developing ILD and limited clinical guidance for evaluating for ILD in CTDs/RA. Despite their mixed experiences, most respondents showed a positive attitude towards lung evaluations, which could be leveraged to ensure regular, proactive screening and evaluation for ILD to improve patient outcomes. Overall, findings from this survey highlight opportunities to improve physician awareness and standardisation of practice for enhanced patient care.

items.titleZh: 患者关于结缔组织病和类风湿关节炎间质性肺病评估的报告：一项国际调查
items.abstractZh: 结缔组织病（CTDs）和类风湿关节炎（RA）共有间质性肺病（ILD）这一肺部并发症。然而，关于CTD/RA诊断后患者对ILD筛查和评估的看法及经历的真实世界数据有限。我们进行了一项国际横断面在线调查，对象为自我报告确诊CTD和RA的患者，以了解其肺部表现及ILD筛查和/或评估的经历。受访者为年龄≥18岁、自我报告患有CTD/RA（伴或不伴ILD）的患者，来自非洲、土耳其、欧洲、日本和美洲。在2,225名受访者中，54%来自欧洲，82%为女性。平均年龄±标准差（SD）为55±11.6岁。从首次症状到CTD/RA诊断的平均（SD）时间为14.78±11.37年。平均而言，受访者在出现首次症状后约延迟2年才被诊断为CTD/RA。从CTD/RA诊断到肺部疾病诊断的平均（SD）时间为9.61±10.09年。70%的受访者报告曾进行过肺部筛查/评估，其中大多数为一般或常规状态检查（39%）。胸部高分辨率计算机断层扫描（HRCT）和肺功能检查（PFTs）是最常被回忆起的评估肺部ILD的检查（均为50%），尤其是在系统性硬化症患者中（分别为73%和87%）。在回忆起通过胸部HRCT扫描或PFTs进行肺部评估的受访者中，检查每1-2年进行一次。大多数调查受访者（87%）认为肺部筛查/评估很重要。该调查显示，CTD/RA患者对肺部表现和ILD的评估经历不一，这归因于发生ILD风险的差异以及CTD/RA中ILD评估的临床指导有限。尽管经历不一，大多数受访者对肺部评估持积极态度，这可用于确保定期、主动的ILD筛查和评估，以改善患者预后。总体而言，本调查结果强调了提高医生意识和实践标准化以改善患者护理的机会。

items.title: Gender inequities in the economic burden of anxiety disorders, depressive disorders, migraine, and rheumatoid arthritis in Mexico, 2005-2021.
items.abstract: Anxiety disorders, depressive disorders, migraine, and rheumatoid arthritis are common chronic conditions that contribute substantially to disability, recurrent care needs, and productivity losses, yet remain comparatively under-prioritised in health policy. In Mexico, these conditions disproportionately affect women, but their economic burden has not been comprehensively quantified from a gender perspective. To estimate the direct and indirect economic burden of anxiety disorders, depressive disorders, migraine, and rheumatoid arthritis in Mexico among adults aged 20 years and older between 2005 and 2021, from a societal perspective and by gender. We conducted a cost-of-illness analysis from a societal perspective. Direct costs were estimated by combining condition-specific prevalence from the Global Burden of Disease Study 2021 (GBD 2021) with normative per-case treatment costs derived from national clinical guidelines and official cost sources. Indirect costs were valued using three complementary approaches: the Human Capital Approach (HCA), based on predicted annual labour income from nationally representative employment surveys; a GDP-per-capita benchmark (1 DALY = 1 GDP per capita); and a willingness-to-pay approach using the value of a statistical life year (VSLY) transferred to Mexico following OECD methods. All costs were expressed in 2021 international dollars (Int$). Between 2005 and 2021, the four disorders accounted for 28.8 million DALYs lost. Migraine was the most prevalent condition, but depressive disorders generated the highest direct costs (Int$310.5 billion) and the largest share of indirect costs (41.1%). Indirect costs totalled Int$106.8 billion under the HCA, Int$582.2 billion under the GDP-per-capita valuation, and Int$2.9 trillion under the willingness-to-pay approach. Under the GDP-per-capita benchmark, the combined economic burden of the four disorders reached approximately Int$1.2 trillion over the study period. Women consistently bore a greater burden than men across all four conditions and under all valuation methods; total indirect costs borne by women were 2.0 times higher for anxiety disorders, 2.1 times higher for depressive disorders, 2.2 times higher for migraine, and 3.8 times higher for rheumatoid arthritis. Anxiety disorders, depressive disorders, migraine, and rheumatoid arthritis impose a substantial and unequally distributed economic burden in Mexico. The persistent excess burden among women indicates that these high-disability chronic disorders should be understood not only as a public health problem, but also as a health equity concern. More gender-responsive priority setting, stronger continuity of care, and better financial protection may help reduce both disability and its downstream economic consequences in Mexico and other LMICs with segmented health systems.
